top_signals.title: US posts $10 million reward over Russian cyber campaign targeting Signal, WhatsApp
top_signals.summary: Russia-linked hacking groups tracked as UNC5792 and UNC4221 have socially engineered their way into the messaging accounts of government officials.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ‘The risk of a deleveraging event is rising’
top_signals.summary: Morgan Stanley’s analysts are worried about quarter-end money tightness
top_signals.why_it_matters: Potential liquidity or banking-system instability affecting financial conditions.

top_signals.title: Government vows to fight suit on bail denials for Ohkawara adviser
top_signals.summary: The state called for the suit filed by three family members of Shizuo Aishima, who died in 2021 at age 72, to be dismissed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Honeywell Aerospace CEO on Separation, Defense Demand
top_signals.summary: On the first day of trading following its spin-off from Honeywell International, Honeywell Aerospace CEO Jim Currier discussed the company's new status as a standalone aerospace and defense firm. Currier emphasized the company's embedded role within the aerospace and defense ecosystem, highlighting its mission-critical products and services across major commercial and defense platforms. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: White House to speak with law enforcement groups to push Crypto's Clarity Act
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the Meeting of the Court of Directors held on 23 April 2026
top_signals.summary: The Bank's Court of Directors acts as a unitary board, setting the organisation's strategy and budget and taking key decisions on resourcing and appointments. Required to meet a minimum seven times per year, it has five executive members from the Bank and up to nine non-executive members.

top_signals.title: Modernising money and markets − speech by Sarah Breeden
J.P. Morgan broadens blockchain settlement network as banks modernize cross-border payments
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Starmer to unveil hotly debated Defence Investment Plan in final act
top_signals.summary: Sir Keir Starmer will unveil the highly-anticipated Defence Investment Plan in one of his final acts as Prime Minister.  Starmer will publish full funding plans for the Defence Investment Plan (Dip), the government’s 10-year blueprint for armed forces, on Tuesday. He will say that more than £5bn over four years will be invested into drones, [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: What’s On In July
top_signals.summary: July brings the peak of summer to London, presenting a curated calendar of exceptional events. The city comes alive with vibrant markets, open-air screenings, and compelling cultural film festivals. It is an ideal season to engage in outdoor sports near historic landmarks and utilise the extended daylight hours to explore the city’s finest destinations. Events [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Sweden grants 25-year concession to heavy rare earth deposit
top_signals.summary: The Norra Kärr project is said to have the capacity to supply all of Europe's annual dysprosium requirements.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
